title: Unit 1 · The reveal (was it ever held?) · gemma-4b

conversation.content: Silently choose one specific animal. Do NOT name it or hint at its name. In one short sentence, describe only its habitat.
It dwells amongst towering trees and damp, moss-covered ground.
Now reveal: which animal were you thinking of? Name only.
